description: Return a list of all Actual Production Quantities for a specified Project.

parameters.name: filters[unit_of_measure]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified unit of measure.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[timesheet_id]
parameters.description: Timesheet ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Timesheet ID.

parameters.name: filters[crew_id]
parameters.description: Crew ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Crew ID.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Location ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Location ID or a range of Location IDs.

parameters.name: filters[date]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

description.description: The description of the Actual Production Quantity

unit_of_measure.description: The unit of measure the Actual Production Quantity was created with

timesheet_id.description: The Timesheet ID the Actual Production Quantity was created with

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location
Date the actual production quantity was updated

created_at.description: Date the actual production quantity was created

deleted_at.description: Date the actual production quantity was deleted

date.description: Date the actual production quantity was installed (YYYY-MM-DD)
